hero.title: Working Capital Loan
hero.tagline: Plug cash-flow gaps and fund seasonal demand with revolving working-capital lines.

features: Pay interest only on the amount used
No collateral for amounts up to ₹15L*
eligibility: Active current account for last 12 months

faqs.a: Our AI underwriting completes most evaluations within 24 hours, with funds typically credited within 48 hours of approval.
No. Prayaan Capital follows full rate-card transparency under the RBI Fair Practice Code. All charges are listed in your sanction letter.
Yes, foreclosure is free after 6 months. Part-payments are allowed once per quarter without charges.

faqs.q: What if my CIBIL is below 700?
faqs.a: Our AI model evaluates 200+ data points beyond CIBIL — cash flow, GST filings, and sector resilience also count toward eligibility.
